titleStmt.title: SII 22.148: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 148. (A.R. No. 148 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJĀDHIRĀJA (II)—10th YEAR (A.D. 1172-3)

summary.p: This records a gift of 32 cows for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyanār by one Kōchchāttau7 Kāmaṉ of Māḍūr in Pānūrkūṟṟam at the instance of the Nāṭṭavar, in expiation of the death of a neighbour's girl caused by the donor's wife who threw a stick at her daughter (in anger). The stick missed its aim and hit the girl who died as a consequence a few days later.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu pa
ttā(ā)vatu Āni mātattu milāṭāṉa jaṉanaātavaḷanāṭṭu
p pāṉūrk kūṟṟattu māṭurillirukkum koccāttan kāman A
kamuṭaiyāḷ tan makaḷai Oru Arai maṇaṅkoliṭṭeṟiya Ivaḷait tap
pi miṇṭan kāman makaḷmele paṭṭu Ippeṇ Irupatānāḷāl marittitu I
tu kai piḻaippāṭena maṭam nāṭṭukkeṟi nāṭṭavar Ūrpākaṅ koṇ ṭaruḷina nā
yanār koyilile Oru tirununtā viḷakku vai yenṟu colli Ippaṭikku Iraṇṭu
tiṟavaru micaintu tiṭṭiṭṭu Ikkoccāttan kāman Ivvānimātattile muppattiraṇ
ṭu pacup poṟittuk koṭuvantu viṭṭān Ivviḷakku Onṟum śantirātit tavaṟ celvatā
ka yitu māheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
